pages.text:
22.11.7928

SAINT CHRISTOPHER AND NEVIS

Ministry of Foreign Affairs,

GOVERNMENT HEADQUARTERS,

P. O. Bax 18G,

ST. KITTS, W. I

Rel. N..... FA/CR18/028

Note No 212/97

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of St Kitts and Nevis presents its compliments its to the Ministry of

Foreign Affairs of the Republic of France and has the honour to announce that the Government of

St Kitts and Nevis has decided to adhere to the Convention relating to International Bureau of

Exhibitions of 22 November 1928 and to the Protocols of 16 November 1966 and 30 November 1972 and to the Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31 May 1988.

The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of St Kitts and Nevis avails itself of this opportunity to convey to the

Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of France the renewed assurance of its highest consideration.

Basseterre 13 May 1997

ML.C/ep

FOREIGN AFFAIRS

I. CHRISTOPHER & NEVS
